name: EggGarden
short_description: Control adorable animals and start running a bustling café! As you manage the ever-increasing number of customers, your café will expand and new menus will keep appearing! Get ready to enjoy a new kind of 3D action game featuring cooking mini-games and serving challenges!
detailed_description:
You will become the cute master of the cafe and manage the store. Complete the mini-games specified for each order to finish cooking the dishes. Serve the completed dishes to the customers and make them happy! If you don't serve them quickly, the customers will get angry from waiting.

Let's Cook and Serve Dishes to the Customers

When the store opens, customers will come in one after another.

Let's cook and deliver the dishes as ordered.

A Wide Variety of Dishes and Mini-Games

To complete the dishes, you need to clear each mini-game.

As the game progresses, new menu items will appear, so stay tuned!

Expanding Store and Increasing Customers

As you successfully handle orders, your store will gradually grow.

The number of customers will increase, making your store busier and busier!

Infinite One-Person Operation Mode

Endurance mode "Endless Mode" where you compete to see how long you can keep the store running by yourself.

Make sure not to mess up the order of the dishes and aim for the top of the rankings.

Cooperative Management Mode

Featuring the "2P Play Mode" where two players can each control their own character and cooperate. Divide the roles effectively and aim for 100 days of nonstop operation!
※Not only does it support local co-op play, but it’s also compatible with the Remote Play Together feature, allowing you to play with friends far away who don’t even own the game!

Streaming Guidelines

  • You are free to stream gameplay or upload videos of the game without prior notification, regardless of whether you are an individual or part of an organization, and whether the activity is for-profit or non-profit.

  • If possible, please include a link to the Steam page in your video description.

  • We are not responsible for any damages resulting from streaming or posting videos of this game.

Note that the contents of these guidelines are subject to change without notice.
